# Project documentation index — passkeys-solution

*Generated by BMad **Document Project** workflow (initial scan, **quick**). Master entry point for brownfield context.*

## Project snapshot

| | |
|---|---|
| **Type** | Monorepo (2 parts: server + app) |
| **Primary languages** | TypeScript |
| **Domains** | WebAuthn/passkeys, Expo Android client, agent harness (RFCs + `tasks/`) |

## Quick reference

### passkeys-server (backend)

| | |
|---|---|
| **Type** | `backend` (Fastify API) |
| **Stack** | Node 20+, Fastify 5, MongoDB, Redis, SimpleWebAuthn |
| **Root** | `passkeys-server/` |

### passkeys-app (mobile)

| | |
|---|---|
| **Type** | `mobile` (Expo / React Native) |
| **Stack** | Expo 53, RN 0.79, Expo Router, react-native-passkey |
| **Root** | `passkeys-app/` |

## Getting started

1. `docker compose up -d`
2. Configure `passkeys-server` `.env` and mkcert certs; `npm run dev` in `passkeys-server/`
3. `adb reverse tcp:3000 tcp:3000` — then `npx expo run:android` in `passkeys-app/`

Details: [development-guide.md](./development-guide.md) and [CLAUDE.md](../CLAUDE.md).
